sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Clark County approves 752-room Las Vegas Strip resort on former SkyVue site
feed.summary: Clark County commissioners have unanimously approved plans for a 752-room hotel-casino resort on the Las Vegas Strip, located on the former SkyVue Ferris wheel site. The project, proposed by developer Eli Applebaum, will feature a heart-shaped hotel tower with an LED facade and will incorporate the unfinished SkyVue concrete towers into a midair restaurant. This development aims to redevelop a site that has been largely vacant for over a decade.

feed.title: PNC rolls out securities-based lending for clients, part of mass affluent push
feed.summary: PNC has introduced a new securities-based lending solution for its wealth management clients, allowing them to access liquidity without selling their investments. This initiative is part of PNC's broader strategy to cater to mass affluent customers and expand its market share. The offering is available to clients who meet specific asset thresholds.

feed.title: Tranche Update on Bread Financial Holdings, Inc.'s Equity Buyback Plan announced on August 27, 2025.
feed.summary: Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. has provided an update on its equity buyback plan announced in August 2025. The company repurchased 2.8 million shares, representing 6.78% of its equity for $241 million, between April 1, 2026, and June 30, 2026. This latest tranche brings the total repurchases under the plan to 7,419,489 shares, or 16.99% of its equity, for a total of $550.99 million.

feed.title: BCE Inc. (NYSE: BCE) to convert all Series AJ preferred shares by August 4, 2026
feed.summary: BCE Inc. has announced that all its floating-rate Series AJ Preferred Shares will convert to fixed-rate Series AI Preferred Shares on August 4, 2026, on a one-for-one basis. This widespread conversion is triggered because the number of Series AJ shares tendered for conversion into Series AI resulted in fewer than the 2,000,000 unit threshold remaining. Post-conversion, the Series AI shares will pay a quarterly fixed cash dividend at an annual rate of 5.10% for five years and will continue trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol BCE.PR.I.

feed.title: AIDS 2026: Gilead, governments must make HIV prevention medicine more accessible
feed.summary: Doctors Without Borders (MSF) urged Gilead Sciences and governments to make the HIV prevention medicine lenacapavir more accessible in low- and middle-income countries, especially Brazil. Lenacapavir is an injectable pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) that is nearly 100-percent effective against HIV but is currently priced out of reach and supply is restricted by Gilead. MSF called for the price to drop to no more than $40 per person per year and encouraged governments to use legal tools like compulsory licenses to override Gilead's monopoly for public health.

feed.title: Price to earnings forward of Primech Holdings Ltd. – NASDAQ:PMEC
feed.summary: This article displays financial information for Primech Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: PMEC), focusing on its forward price-to-earnings ratio. The content is primarily a data placeholder from TradingView, indicating that no specific value or change has been recorded for this metric yet.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Stock Could Be Fully Priced Despite Fresh Options Listing News
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has delivered strong returns over the past five years, but its stock appears fully priced or overvalued based on various metrics. Despite its financial strength and position in options trading, the current price leaves less room for upside. The article highlights both bull and bear cases regarding its valuation, suggesting investors are already paying a premium for its quality.

feed.title: Avanos Medical (AVNS) Rebounds Sharply, Is The Stock Above Fair Value?
feed.summary: Avanos Medical (AVNS) has seen a sharp rebound in its share price, with a 123.43% year-to-date return, despite reporting a net loss of $74.4 million on revenues of $715.9 million. The company currently trades at a price-to-sales (P/S) ratio of 1.6x, considered overvalued compared to its estimated fair P/S of 1.2x, although it appears undervalued relative to the broader US Medical Equipment industry average. Investors are advised to review the company's financials and potential risks due to its mixed performance and current valuation.

feed.title: Cummins Adjusts 2027 Engine Rollout After EPA Proposal
feed.summary: Cummins is adjusting its rollout of Model Year 2027 on-highway diesel engines due to the EPA's proposal to ease implementation requirements for its 2027 emissions rule. The company plans a "measured transition" using implementation flexibilities, gradually introducing new HELM engine platforms (X10 and X15) while current-generation engines remain available. This phased approach aims to maintain regulatory compliance, support OEM schedules, and ensure product quality and a smooth transition for customers.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) Declares Quarterly Cash Dividen
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share of common stock, payable on September 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 2, 2026. This decision, made public on July 23, 2026, highlights the company's commitment to shareholder value and robust financial health. Investors are encouraged to review GuruFocus.com for further analysis of ODFL's financial strategies and market performance.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Stock Climbs As New Defense Deals Pile Up
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) stock has climbed over 11% following several major defense contract wins, including a 12-year logistics deal with U.S. Special Operations Command worth up to $10.5 billion and a $1.6 billion F-35 spares order for the U.S. Navy. The company is also expanding into next-gen defense technologies like hypersonic missiles and laser systems. Despite some analysts trimming price targets, LMT's substantial backlog, recurring revenue streams, and strategic investments in innovation continue to drive investor interest.

feed.title: BATL Stock Rockets As Refinancing Fuels Monument Draw Push
feed.summary: Battalion Oil Corp (BATL) stock surged significantly after refinancing its $162.5M senior secured term loan, reducing interest rates and extending maturity. The new credit agreement also adds $175M in delayed-draw capacity, intended to fund the company's Monument Draw program, fueling optimism among traders despite the company's current losses. This development has transformed BATL into a high-volatility trading vehicle, attracting momentum traders.

feed.title: Allegion (ALLE) Stock Climbs Ahead Of Q2 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Allegion's (ALLE) stock has climbed by 12.58% ahead of its Q2 2026 earnings call, driven by strong earnings momentum and positive forward guidance. The company is set to release its Q2 results on July 23, 2026, which is anticipated to be a significant catalyst for continued volatility. Traders are watching whether the actual results and management's tone will meet the high expectations already priced into the stock.

feed.title: As Wall Street Cuts Tesla, Morgan Stanley Raises Its Apple Target
feed.summary: While Wall Street has reduced its outlook for Tesla following a disappointing earnings report, analysts are raising targets for Apple due to strong performance from its iPhone 17 and Services division. Apple's stock is rated a "buy" with an 11% upside potential over the next 12 months, driven by robust quarterly revenue, a large installed device base, and significant share buyback authorization. Conversely, Tesla's missed earnings and high forward P/E contrast sharply with Apple's growth and more favorable valuation perspective.

feed.title: Tractor Supply sputters in Q2, lowers outlook
feed.summary: Tractor Supply struggled in Q2, with net sales barely rising and comparable store sales declining, leading to a lowered outlook for the year. The company attributes its performance to adverse weather, a faltering pet business, and increased competition from Amazon and Walmart in rural markets. As a result, Tractor Supply plans to slow store expansion, close underperforming Petsense stores, and redirect investments to last-mile delivery and store remodels.

feed.title: Some Kroger eggs recalled in Texas due to Salmonella risk, FDA says
feed.summary: Indiana-based Midwest Poultry Service, L.P. has issued a recall for over 1.5 million white shell and brown cage-free eggs produced in Texas and sold at Kroger and Brookshire Grocery stores, among others, due to potential Salmonella contamination. The products were distributed to several states with "Best By" dates between July 20 and August 17. Customers are advised to discard or return the eggs for a full refund, though no specific illnesses have been reported yet.

feed.title: Vandita Jadeja - 24/7 Wall St.
feed.summary: Bank of America has updated its stance on AMD, influencing investor perspectives ahead of AMD's crucial earnings report. The article highlights both bull and bear cases for AMD and provides recent market updates including S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Nasdaq performance, alongside earnings reports from companies like Pool Corp, Equity LifeStyle Properties, and upcoming reports from Allegion, Ameriprise, West Pharmaceutical Services, and Harley-Davidson. It also includes an opinion piece on Meta's AI CapEx and Micron's recent performance.

feed.title: Qualcomm Inc Stock (QCOM) Moved Down by 3.68% on Jul 23: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Qualcomm Inc (QCOM) stock dropped by 3.68% due to softening global premium smartphone demand, profit-taking in the tech sector, and concerns over competition and proprietary chip development by partners. Technical indicators like MACD and Williams %R suggest a sell signal. Analyst forecasts are increasingly cautious, with an average price target of $216.22 amidst risks like Arm licensing litigation and customer concentration.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Inc Stock (TXN) Moved Down by 3.38% on Jul 23: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Texas Instruments Inc (TXN) stock declined by 3.38% on July 23, driven primarily by a cautious outlook for industrial and automotive sector recoveries and high capital expenditures impacting free cash flow. Analysts have revised price targets downwards due to margin compression and macroeconomic uncertainties. The company also faces challenges from broader semiconductor market sentiment, geopolitical factors, and currency fluctuations.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Inc Stock (TMUS) Moved Down by 6.61% on Jul 23: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc. (TMUS) stock dropped by 6.61% on July 23rd due to revised growth expectations stemming from softened net postpaid subscriber additions, increased capital expenditures, and higher marketing costs. The company is also facing macroeconomic headwinds, institutional selling pressure, and ongoing regulatory concerns, all contributing to a reassessment of its near-term valuation.

feed.title: Transcript: Banner Q2 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Banner Corporation reported a net profit of $48.9 million ($1.43 per diluted share) for Q2 2026, up from $1.31 per share in the prior year, with core earnings reaching $64.4 million. The company experienced strong loan growth (up 45% quarter-over-quarter) across commercial, construction, and consumer segments, maintaining a solid net interest margin and an 87% loan-to-deposit ratio. Banner anticipates continued loan growth and stable deposit costs, with a slight margin expansion in Q3, and is on track to close the Bank of the Pacific acquisition in Q3, which will further bolster its core deposit base.

feed.title: Costco Just Settled a $14 Million Lawsuit Over Its Emails. Are You Owed Cash?
feed.summary: Costco has agreed to a $14 million settlement resolving a class action lawsuit over promotional emails sent to Washington state customers with allegedly misleading subject lines. Customers who received such emails between June 2, 2021, and July 7, 2026, and resided in Washington state at the time may be eligible for a cash payment. Claims must be filed by August 24, 2026, through the official Costco Email Settlement website.

feed.title: United Rentals Q2 Earnings Beat on Rental Growth, '26 Guidance Raised
feed.summary: United Rentals (URI) reported strong Q2 2026 results, with adjusted earnings of $12.76 per share and total revenues of $4.41 billion, both surpassing consensus estimates. The company saw record rental revenues and improved fleet productivity, leading to an 8.3% stock gain after hours. Management also raised its full-year 2026 guidance for revenues, adjusted EBITDA, and net cash provided by operating activities.

feed.title: Wells Fargo cuts more jobs in West Des Moines, pushing total past 300
feed.summary: Wells Fargo announced another round of layoffs in West Des Moines, adding 20 employees to the list and bringing the total to 301 since an initial cut in February. This is part of a broader trend of job cuts led by CEO Charlie Scharf since 2019, with over 1,500 Iowa employees laid off since April 2022. The company's national employment has decreased by approximately 65,000 since 2019 as it adjusts staffing levels amid industry changes and higher interest rates.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) director awarded deferred share credits and trust holdings
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) director Elizabeth A. Vorsheck received 99.758 Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits on July 21, 2026, through dividend reinvestment, increasing her direct share-credit balance to 14,560.846. These credits entitle her to Class A shares upon leaving board service. The Form 4 filing also details her indirect holdings of Class A and Class B shares through various trusts, with Class B shares convertible to Class A at a 2,400-to-1 rate.

feed.title: Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham Welcome You to EA SPORTS FC™ 27, Launching Worldwide on September 25
feed.summary: EA Sports has announced the worldwide launch of EA SPORTS FC™ 27 on September 25, 2026, featuring Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham on the Ultimate Plus Edition cover. The new game introduces "The Grounds" social football playground, a rebuilt Career Transfer Market, and the FUT™ Gallery to enhance player experience and connection to football culture. Pre-orders are now available across multiple platforms, with early access benefits for Ultimate Plus Edition and EA Play members.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares reported a strong Q2 with significant organic loan and deposit growth, increased revenue, and improved profitability. The bank announced the completion of its Cadence systems conversion, marking an "inflection point" where it will now focus on growth and realizing $365 million in cost synergies by Q4. Despite expecting net interest income toward the lower end of guidance due to deposit cost pressure, fee income and credit quality remain strong, and the company reaffirmed its longer-term 2027 targets.

feed.title: CN Railway agrees to end opposition to Union Pacific’s mega-merger in U.S.
feed.summary: Canadian National Railway Co. (CNR-T) has agreed to end its opposition to Union Pacific Corp.'s (UNP-N) proposed $85-billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern Corp. (NSC-N). In exchange for its tacit support, CN will receive more network access in the U.S. Midwest. This agreement is contingent on approval from the U.S. Surface Transportation Board for the acquisition.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ: ERIE) EVP credited dividend-based deferred shares
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity's EVP and CIO, Srinivasa Parthasarathy, received 18.501 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan share credits through dividend reinvestment on July 21, 2026. These credits, which are rights to Class A common shares upon retirement, increase his total deferred share-credit balance to 2,748.676. The transaction was reported via a Form 4 SEC filing and is part of a plan for management and highly compensated employees.

feed.title: AbbVie: Bright Future, But Already Priced In (NYSE:ABBV)
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. is rated a 'Hold' due to its slight overvaluation and high debt levels, despite strong Q1/26 revenue and free cash flow growth. The company's growth is largely driven by Skyrizi and Rinvoq, with pipeline diversification coming from Neuroscience and the Apogee Therapeutics acquisition. However, significant leverage from recent acquisitions and a reliance on two key drugs, coupled with its elevated valuation, limit its near-term attractiveness.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) CFO gains 14.189 share credits via plan
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity Company's EVP & CFO, Julie Marie Pelkowski, acquired 14.189 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan Share Credits on July 21, 2026, through dividend reinvestment. These credits, representing the right to an equivalent number of Class A common shares upon separation, increase her holdings to 2,107.922 share credits and 672 direct Class A common shares. The transaction was reported on a Form 4 SEC filing, indicating it was an "other acquisition" and not an open-market trade.

feed.title: Full Transcript: Pool Q2 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Pool Corporation reported a 2% increase in Q2 2026 net sales, driven by strong recurring maintenance and building materials sales, despite a weak new construction market. CEO John Wapwood outlined four strategic priorities: sales excellence, pricing and supply chain discipline, operational execution, and disciplined M&A to enhance competitive advantage and profitability. The company maintained its full-year adjusted earnings guidance of $10.87 to $11.17 per share, anticipating low single-digit top-line growth primarily from pricing.

feed.title: ALHC INVESTOR ALERT: HBSS Launches Investigation into Alignment Healthcare, Inc. (ALHC) Following Whistleblower Allegations of Financial Manipulation
feed.summary: Hagens Berman Sobol Shapiro LLP (HBSS) has launched an investigation into Alignment Healthcare, Inc. (ALHC) following whistleblower allegations of financial manipulation. A former executive claims the company misclassified operating expenses as capital expenditures to inflate adjusted EBITDA, impacting stock price and executive compensation. This news led to a 16.7% drop in ALHC's stock, and HBSS is encouraging investors with significant losses to come forward.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges First Solar, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 26, 2025, and February 24, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that First Solar made materially false and misleading statements regarding its capacity to manage U.S. tariff policy impacts and the negative effects of its responses to these policies on projected performance. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of August 24, 2026.

feed.title: Mbappé and Bellingham Share EA SPORTS FC 27's Ultimate Plus Cover
feed.summary: Electronic Arts (NASDAQ: EA) announced that Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham will grace the cover of the EA SPORTS FC™ 27 Ultimate Plus Edition, launching worldwide on September 25, 2026. The new game introduces social football playground "The Grounds," a rebuilt Career Transfer Market, and the all-new FUT Gallery, offering enhanced gameplay and deeper player connection. Pre-orders are now available across multiple platforms, with early access beginning September 18, 2026, for Ultimate Edition and Ultimate Plus Edition purchasers.

feed.title: Communicators spotlight: Adobe's Stacy Martinet
feed.summary: Stacy Martinet, Adobe's newly appointed chief content and creative officer, discusses her role at the intersection of technology and creativity, particularly with the company's focus on AI tools for creatives. She shares insights from her career path, the importance of collaboration, and her perspectives on the evolving landscape of content and marketing within companies. Martinet emphasizes that content and creative teams are increasingly operating like media companies, with a focus on editorial instincts and continuous storytelling.

feed.title: PG&E Q2 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: PG&E (NYSE: PCG) announced Q2 2026 core EPS of $0.40, reinforcing its full-year guidance of $1.64 to $1.66, representing a 10% increase over 2025, and a projected 9%+ annual EPS growth through 2030. The company plans a $73 billion capital investment through 2030 without requiring additional equity, aiming for a 20% dividend payout by 2028, and is committed to customer affordability with a target of 0-3% annual bill growth. PG&E also highlighted strong wildfire safety performance, improved reliability, and a significant data center demand pipeline, while emphasizing the critical need for California wildfire liability reform to accelerate investment-grade ratings and protect customer affordability.

feed.title: Dow Boosts Outlook After Q2 Beat, Targets $2B in Total Savings
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW) reported strong second-quarter earnings, exceeding analyst expectations with adjusted EPS of $1.44 and revenue of $12.09 billion. The company saw a significant rise in operating EBITDA and achieved over $300 million in quarterly benefits from self-help initiatives, completing its $1 billion 2025 cost-savings program. Dow has raised its 2026 self-help benefits target to over $1.3 billion and is on track for a total of $2 billion in cumulative savings by 2027.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity Co (ERIE) SVP gains deferral plan share credits
feed.summary: Jorie L. Novacek, SVP and Controller at Erie Indemnity Co (ERIE), acquired 6.7650 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan Share Credits on July 21, 2026, through dividend reinvestment. These share credits, priced at $215.8200 each, represent the right to receive an equivalent number of Erie Indemnity Class A common shares upon her retirement or separation from service. This transaction increases her direct plan holdings to 1005.1240 Share Credits.

feed.title: CN agrees to end opposition to Union Pacific's railway mega-merger in U.S.
feed.summary: Canadian National Railway Co. and Union Pacific Corp. have reached an agreement where CN will cease its opposition to Union Pacific's proposed US$85-billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern Corp. In exchange, CN will gain greater network access in the U.S. Midwest. This deal is contingent on approval from the U.S. Surface Transportation Board, which previously rejected an amended merger application.

feed.title: Crown Castle CEO: Edge opportunity is gaining momentum
feed.summary: Crown Castle CEO Christian Hillabrant announced the company's intention to deploy more Edge infrastructure, leveraging its extensive network of tower sites to support growing demand for compute. This strategy positions Crown Castle to address data center challenges like power and construction constraints, utilizing existing land, power, and connectivity at its 40,000 US sites. Hillabrant foresees this move as a significant revenue driver, despite reporting a drop in Q2 site rental revenues and pursuing a $3.5 billion claim against Dish Wireless.

feed.title: 3 Oil Pipeline MLP Stocks Riding on Favorable Industry Trends
feed.summary: The article highlights that oil and natural gas pipeline Master Limited Partnerships (MLPs) are poised for significant growth due to billions in capital projects and increasing clean energy demand from data centers. These MLPs benefit from stable fee-based revenues through long-term contracts. The article identifies Enterprise Products Partners LP (EPD), Energy Transfer LP (ET), and ONEOK Inc. (OKE) as key players with strong prospects in this favorable industry trend.

feed.title: The Set It and Forget It Monthly Dividend Stocks Retirees Wish They’d Bought 20 Years Ago
feed.summary: This article highlights five monthly dividend stocks that offer consistent income, making them attractive for retirees. It details each company's dividend history, yield, coverage, and associated risks, emphasizing that while some (like Realty Income and Main Street Capital) provide stable payouts, others (like AGNC Investment) come with higher risk despite high yields. The author suggests these stocks serve various risk appetites and can help grow monthly income to combat inflation.

feed.title: Transcript : Amalgamated Financial Corp., Q2 2026 Earnings Call, Jul 23, 2026
feed.summary: This article is a transcript of Amalgamated Financial Corporation's Q2 2026 earnings conference call, held on July 23, 2026. The transcript begins with the operator's welcoming remarks but notes that the full content is reserved for subscribers. Additional information provided includes recent news about Amalgamated Financial Corp., such as its Q2 earnings report, an equity buyback announcement, and dividend information.

feed.title: Woori Bank Chief Jeong Jin-wan Eases Housing Costs for Young Staff
feed.summary: Woori Bank President Jeong Jin-wan is addressing the housing burden for young, non-homeowning employees by planning to construct a new 200-room dormitory in Seoul at a cost of about 75 billion won. This initiative aims to boost employee morale and secure top talent. Additionally, Jeong is pushing for significant investments in AI infrastructure, including building an 80-megawatt AI Center and redeveloping a branch into a complex financial hub, demonstrating his focus on the bank's future and digital transformation.

feed.title: Jefferies Raises Edison International Price Target to $68 From $66
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Edison International (EIX) to $68 from $66. This adjustment was reported by MT Newswires on July 23, 2026, at 11:47 am EDT. Shares of Edison International were trading at $79.94, experiencing a slight dip on the day but showing significant year-to-date growth.

feed.title: TRAVELERS COMPANIES, INC. SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 144 SEC filing by TRAVELERS COMPANIES, INC. (TRV) on July 23, 2026. The filing details the proposed sale of securities, including information about the issuer, the person selling the securities, and the acquisition details of the securities being sold. The filing also indicates that no securities were sold in the past three months by the person making this filing.

feed.title: Dover (NYSE:DOV) Announces Quarterly Earnings Results
feed.summary: Dover (NYSE:DOV) recently announced its quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst EPS estimates but slightly missing revenue projections. The company reported strong bookings and raised its full-year EPS guidance for 2026, driven by robust first-half performance and healthy demand across its segments. Despite some near-term margin pressure from refrigeration execution issues, Dover highlighted significant growth in secular areas like data center liquid cooling and aerospace.

feed.title: Tranche Update on AvalonBay Communities, Inc.'s Equity Buyback Plan announced on February 27, 2026.
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. has provided an update on its equity buyback plan, originally announced on February 27, 2026. The company has repurchased 0 shares worth $0 million between April 1, 2026, and July 23, 2026. Cumulatively, AvalonBay has repurchased 492,378 shares, representing 0.35% of its shares, for $85.85 million under the stated buyback program.

feed.title: TRUIST FINANCIAL CORP SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 144 SEC filing by Truist Financial Corp (TFC) on July 23, 2026. The filing indicates a proposed sale of 3,986 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $202,090.20, acquired through restricted stock vesting on December 31, 2025. The transaction is set to occur on July 23, 2026, through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC.
